# The Tantric Garden

> The Tantric Garden is a professional tantric massage centre in Palma de Mallorca, Balearic Islands, Spain. We offer sensory rituals in an intimate, carefully prepared space, hosted by certified masseuses trained in somatic and tantric arts.

## Key facts

- **Name:** The Tantric Garden (formerly known as Tantric Mallorca)
- **Type:** Tantric massage centre
- **Location:** Carrer de la Vinyassa, 25, Llevant, 07005 Palma, Illes Balears, Spain
- **Coordinates:** 39.575691, 2.655830
- **Hours:** Monday to Sunday, 10:00 to 21:00
- **Booking:** By appointment only, via WhatsApp from the website
- **Audience:** Adults aged 18+
- **Website:** https://www.tantricmallorca.com

## Rituals offered

The centre offers four signature tantric rituals:

- **Lotus Ritual** (Ritual del Loto · Rituel du Lotus · Lotus-Ritual) — Intimate tantric encounter with movement, connection and varied postures. 30 min · 80 € or 60 min · 150 €.
- **Double Tide** (Doble Marea · Double Marée · Doppelte Gezeit) — Two-part sensory journey opening with a delicate water ritual. 60 min · 200 €.
- **Garden of Veils** (Jardín de Velos · Jardin des Voiles · Garten der Schleier) — Sensual and erotic dance on the divan with fabrics and lingerie. 70 min · 250 €.
- **Imperial Ritual** (Ritual Imperial · Rituel Impérial · Imperiales Ritual) — Most exclusive experience weaving together movement, water, veils and connection. 70 min · 300 €.

All rituals are available as individual sessions and in couples format.

## Masseuses

The Tantric Garden hosts five professional masseuses, all trained in somatic and tantric arts: Martina, Melany, Ela, Dulce María and Heydi. Each has a dedicated profile page on the website with biography and photos.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.tantricmallorca.com/) — Overview, rituals and atmosphere
- [Martina](https://www.tantricmallorca.com/masajistas/martina) — Masseuse profile
- [Melany](https://www.tantricmallorca.com/masajistas/melany) — Masseuse profile

- [Dulce María](https://www.tantricmallorca.com/masajistas/dulce-maria) — Masseuse profile

## Frequently asked

- **What is The Tantric Garden?** A tantric massage centre in Palma de Mallorca offering sensory rituals in an intimate, carefully prepared space, hosted by professional masseuses trained in somatic and tantric arts.
- **Where is it located?** Carrer de la Vinyassa, 25, Llevant, 07005 Palma, Illes Balears, Spain.
- **What are the opening hours?** Monday to Sunday, 10:00 to 21:00, by appointment.
- **How do I book?** Through WhatsApp from the website, indicating the ritual and your availability.
- **Is previous experience required?** No. Each session adapts to the rhythm and sensitivity of the person receiving it.
